Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x51E0 "MRSMOP-51E0" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Mrs. Mop.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port two to start the game as well as the space bar:
1. Patched the JSR $FFE4 instruction at $5127 to be JSR $7B00 instead 2. Added a small routine at $7B00 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumlator to $20 and returns, which starts the game as if the space bar is pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JMPs to $FFE4 to carry on the normal code flow.
